channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: HRCP Report 2025: Decline in Civic Freedoms and Judicial Independence in Pakistan
item.description: The Human Rights Commission of Pakistan (HRCP) launched its annual report for 2025, detailing significant deterioration in human rights across the country. The report highlighted severe contraction of...

item.title: UAE Leaves Opec to Focus on National Energy and Economic Goals
item.description: The United Arab Emirates has officially exited Opec, a decision that has surprised many in the global energy market. Sultan Al Jaber, UAE's Industry and Advanced Technology Minister and CEO of Adnoc, ...

item.title: Adam Levine Admits to Inappropriate Flirting with Sumner Stroh While Married
item.description: In this story we look back at the 2022 scandal wey involve Maroon 5 singer Adam Levine and Instagram model Sumner Stroh. Stroh, wey be 23 years old that time, come out publicly for TikTok and accuse L...

item.title: Kenya's Bio-Corn Products EPZ Limited Faces Auction Over Loan Default
item.description: Eldoret-based chemical company, Bio-Corn Products EPZ Limited, is set to be auctioned after defaulting on a loan from a local financial institution. The firm, operating on a 15.2-acre industrial site ...

item.title: The remarkable journey of three Indian soldiers escaping Singapore to return to India in 1942
item.description: During World War II, when Singapore fell to Japanese forces on 15 February 1942, around 50,000 Indian Army soldiers became prisoners of war. Among them, Captains Balbir Singh, Pritam Singh and Gangara...

item.title: Concerns Raised About Safety and Training of U.S. Truck Drivers
item.description: A trucking industry insider has raised concerns over safety risks on U.S. highways due to improperly trained commercial truck drivers, including some who are illegal immigrants. Mike Kucharski, co-own...

item.title: 76ers and Knicks Prepare for Second-Round Rematch as Embiid Appeals to Fans
item.description: The Philadelphia 76ers face the New York Knicks in a highly anticipated Eastern Conference semi-final rematch starting Monday. The series rekindles memories from a tight 2024 matchup, where the Knicks...

item.title: DSWD Reports Over 52,000 Families and Nearly 200,000 People Affected by Mayon Volcano's Ongoing Unrest
item.description: The Department of Social Welfare and Development (DSWD) has reported that more than 52,000 families, equivalent to over 199,000 individuals, have been affected by the continued unrest of Mayon Volcano...

item.title: Pradayut Bordoloi resigns from Nagaon, to contest Dispur Assembly seat with BJP in 2026
item.description: Pradayut Bordoloi, a veteran politician from Assam, has made a significant shift in his political journey by resigning as the sitting Lok Sabha MP from Nagaon to contest the 2026 Assam Legislative Ass...

item.title: Makonda Urges Financial Independence to Protect Press Freedom in Tanzania
item.description: Paul Makonda, Tanzania's Minister for Information, Culture, Arts, and Sports, emphasized the need for financial resilience among journalists and media organizations to safeguard press freedom in the c...

item.title: Tunnel of 'Termite Gang' Leading to Pawnshop Discovered in Novaliches
item.description: A tunnel believed to be part of the 'Termite Gang's' activities was discovered in Novaliches, Quezon City, leading to a pawnshop. Authorities suspect that the gang was planning to use the tunnel to ro...

item.title: Reconstructing 7,000 Years of Fire History on Kangaroo Island Through Lake Sediments
item.description: Following the devastating 2019–2020 Black Summer bushfires, scientists turned to Lashmars Lagoon on Kangaroo Island to study long-term fire history. By analysing a seven-metre sediment core containing...

item.title: Top 33 Gift Ideas for Wives in 2026 Based on Interests and Lifestyle
item.description: CNN Underscored has curated a list of 33 thoughtful gift ideas for wives in 2026, covering a variety of interests from tech gadgets to self-care and home accessories. The guide emphasizes choosing gif...

item.title: Canadian M&A Market Shows Strategic Growth Despite Global Challenges
item.description: Canada's mergers and acquisitions (M&A) market is recovering from a slowdown experienced in early 2025 due to tariff uncertainties and geopolitical tensions. According to Christine Pouliot, PwC's vice...

item.title: US State Department Describes Taiwan as Trusted Partner During President Lai's Visit to Eswatini
item.description: The United States has described Taiwan as a trusted and capable partner. This statement came from the US State Department regarding the visit of Taiwan President Lai Ching-te to Eswatini. The presiden...

item.title: Court Sentences Man to 12 Years for Attacking Elderly Herder
item.description: Dar es Salaam Sub-Registry of the High Court has sentenced Ramadhan Muhunzi to 12 years in prison after he was found guilty of attempting to murder Kaburu Lacha, a 78-year-old livestock keeper from Ma...

item.title: Bandits attack Gwalgoro village in Katsina after failed raid, eleven civilians killed
item.description: For Katsina State, wahala no dey end as eleven people don lose their lives for Gwalgoro village in Kankia Local Government Area. The matter start after security forces block one operation wey notoriou...

item.title: Stocks Up, Oil Steady as Investors React to Middle East Proposals
item.description: Investors in Asia saw mixed results on Monday, with stocks making slight gains while oil prices remained stable. Brent crude futures rose by 0.2% to $108.36 per barrel, recovering from an earlier drop...

item.title: High-Net-Worth Canadians Prioritizing Life Satisfaction Over Wealth Accumulation
item.description: In Canada, a growing number of affluent individuals are shifting their financial priorities from accumulating wealth to achieving a sense of 'enough.' This trend involves clients reassessing what trul...

item.title: Kenyan Opposition Voices Concern Over President Ruto's Planned Visit to Tanzania
item.description: The Orange Democratic Movement's Linda Mwananchi movement has expressed serious concerns over President William Ruto's planned visit to Tanzania and his scheduled address to the Tanzanian Parliament. ...
